emails.subject: Re: Statement of Work Template, Etc.
emails.body: F.Y.I. Please see below how Jim manually voted. Do you want a machine recount plus a manual recount of the votes so that you have a chance to compare the EOTT template to the ETS IT template? Forwarded by Denis Tu/FGT/Enron on 11/20/2000 08:56 AM James Saunders 11/20/2000 08:20 AM

emails.body: Re: Statement of Work Template, Etc. Attached is the ETS IT Statement of Work template. It has not been changed yet to reflect the GPG to ETS name change.
